mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operation_log (user_id, username, action, detail, ip, create_time) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{username}, #{action}, #{detail}, #{ip}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, username, action, detail, ip, create_time FROM sys_operation_log WHERE 1 = 1 AND action LIKE CONCAT('%', #{pd.action}, '%') AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{pd.username}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC
